Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant'S Responses To Form Interrogatories, Request For Production Of Documents And Request For Admissions; Request For Monetary Sanctions; Request For Deemed Admissions
Off Calendar Apr-25-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Wendy L. Hillger, Esq., for plaintiff and moving party: 1031-1033-1035-1037 Divisadero Tenancy in Common

NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff 1031-1033-1035-1037 Divisadero's motion to compel responses to form interrogatories (set #1 and 2) and request for production of documents (set #1 and 2) and for an order to deem certain matters admitted (requests for admissions set #1) is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objection within 15 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $872.50 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. ORDER SIGNED. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

Notice Of Motion To Compel Deft'S Responses To Form Interrogatories, Request For Production Of Documents And Request For Admissions; For Monetary Sanctions; For Deemed Admissions
Off Calendar Mar-13-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Sandra Luna, Bonnie Spindler and Keri-Anne chekene's motion to compel responses to form interrogatories, request for production of documents, and requests for admission is ordered off calendar as it was not timely noticed. CCP Section 1005, requires that motions be served and filed 16 court days prior to the hearing, with five calendar days added if the motion was served by mail. The motion was filed on February 15, 2007. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
